description_long: This object is a compact, tactical-style shotgun with a short barrel and a robust, utilitarian design. The body is predominantly matte black, with a thick, cylindrical barrel and a slightly angular receiver. The grip is integrated into the rear of the frame, forming a pistol grip with no visible shoulder stock, making the weapon more maneuverable in close quarters. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The front end of the shotgun is blunt, with a single barrel opening and no visible ribbing or venting. The overall appearance suggests a focus on functionality and durability, suitable for urban environments where space and quick handling are priorities.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a short barrel and pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use. It features a robust, utilitarian build with a rounded trigger guard and no visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the short barrel, pistol grip, and the overall compact design.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the single barrel opening and the symmetrical, blunt muzzle profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the compact frame and grip, with visible receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pistol grip and the end of the receiver, with no stock present.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, no finger grooves or reinforcement
